evals.prompt: Audit our organic social channel from reach to assisted qualified leads and identify which content formats serve awareness versus conversion.
evals.expected_output: Evaluates the channel against its role and drills into content and business outcomes.

evals.prompt: Audit a paid campaign with conversions but no CRM qualification data.
evals.expected_output: Reports platform efficiency while withholding lead-quality conclusions.

evals.prompt: Compare email open rate directly with Google Ads CTR and rank the better channel.
evals.expected_output: Rejects the invalid metric comparison and reframes by channel role and outcomes.
